AUTH_EMAIL_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists
AUTH_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before signing in
AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
AUTH_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action
PORT_SCAN_IN_PROGRESS: A port scan is already in progress
AUTH_OTP_NOT_FOUND: No OTP found. Please request a new one.
AUTH_OTP_EXPIRED: OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
AUTH_OTP_MAX_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please request a new OTP.
AUTH_INVALID_RESET_SESSION: Invalid reset session. Please start over.
AUTH_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Reset has expired. Please start over.
AUTH_VERIFY_LINK_EXPIRED: Verification link has expired. Please sign up again.
SERVER_CONFIG_ERROR: Server configuration error. Please try again later.
SERVER_TIMEOUT: Request timed out. Please try again.
CAPTCHA_FAILED: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
CAPTCHA_UNAVAILABLE: Unable to verify captcha right now. Please try again.
NETWORK_CONNECTION_ERROR: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
CDN_DOWNLOAD_FAILED: Download server is not ready. Please wait a moment and try again.
